posts.title: Halloween costumes by tiny neural net
posts.summary: I've recently been experimenting with one of my favorite old-school neural networks, a tiny program that runs on my laptop and knows only about the data I give it. Without internet training, char-rnn doesn't have outside references to draw on (for better or for worse) but
posts.author: Janelle Shane
